# Biomarker catalog

**Auto-generated by** `scripts/audit_biomarkers.py`. Re-run after any change under `knowledge_base/hosted/content/{biomarkers,indications,algorithms,redflags}/`. Do not hand-edit.

Purpose: single source of truth for which biomarkers OpenOnco's engine actually consumes. Drives the PDF-extraction pattern library (`docs/plans/biopsy_pdf_extraction_2026-04-26.md`) ‚Äî only catalog-listed biomarkers get regex patterns.
